narrative_beat: A besta de Apocalipse 13 emerge do mar — mas o mar é de dados digitais, reinterpretando a visão de João para a era da IA

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: extreme low-angle, camera at water level looking up
shot.depth_of_field: beast in focus, swirling data sea slightly blurred in foreground

subject.primary: massive crimson beast with seven heads rising from swirling digital data waves, each head crowned differently, scales textured as circuit boards with golden trace lines, body radiating crimson and amber light
subject.focal_point: the central most prominent head, largest and most illuminated, rising highest
subject.secondary: swirling data waves made of cascading 0s and 1s in gold, washing around the beast's emerging lower body
props: seven heads with individual crown variants
floating orange embers rising from each glowing head

environment.location: dark coastline with city silhouette visible at horizon
environment.time_of_day: apocalyptic twilight, sky dark and turbulent
environment.atmosphere: biblical terror, the ancient prophecy made technological flesh

composition.rule: rule of thirds — beast centered rising vertically, data sea in lower third, Ken Burns slow pull-back
composition.foreground: swirling golden binary data waves in immediate foreground
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white coastline city skyline under dark churning sky

lighting.key_light: internal amber glow from within the beast's chest and throat, illuminating from below
lighting.fill_light: minimal — dark environment, only beast provides light
lighting.rim_light: crimson atmospheric backlight from sky silhouetting the beast's upper form
lighting.mood: apocalyptic emergence, the revelation of Revelation made real

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: primal biblical terror, the shock of prophecy made tangible

symbolism.primary: the beast from the sea — Revelation 13:1 — but the sea is the digital information ocean humanity has created
symbolism.secondary: circuit-board scales represent the fusion of the prophetic beast with artificial intelligence

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
